title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/01/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.85% today, the main contract closed 855.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general.PBF at Shandong port deal 838-840 yuan/mt,increase 2-8 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 845 yuan/mt,increase 5-10 yuan/mt. As of January 6, the inventory of 35 ports tracked by SMM had totaled 127.87 million tons, down 600000 tons compared with last week and 24.77 million tons compared with the same period last year. Up to now, 35 ports have been destocked for three consecutive periods.
